title: MillionTools
description: There will be a lot of tools in this mod. Pickaxes have already been added, such as: watermelon pickaxe, pork block pickaxe, honey block pickaxe, bee hive pickaxe and others. Many Pickaxes have functionality.
body:
There will be a lot of pickaxes in this mod. Pickaxes have already been added, such as: watermelon pickaxe, pork block pickaxe, honey block pickaxe, bee hive pickaxe and others. Many Pickaxes have functionality, for example: the pickaxe is made from a block of honey, each tick in the hand has a very small chance of replacing the block (under the Player) with honey if the block is sand, dirt or grass block.
The TNT Pickaxe can generate TNT randomly. There is also a chance when digging blocks. The Pig Block Pickaxe spawns a pig when you right click.
